Your task is to respond to the subsequent questions with a clear conscience. It is avisable to carry out this task in a tranquil environment, minimzing any potential sources of distraction. The collected personal data will exclusively serve the purpose of subsequent data analysis. You will be asked to provide information pertaining to gender, age, native language, educational background, current marital status, and your engagement on Instagram. VVVVoooolllluuuunnnnttttaaaarrrriiiinnnneeeessssssss aaaannnndddd aaaannnnoooonnnnyyyymmmmiiiittttyyyy Participation in the study is entirely voluntary. You have the option to withdraw from the study at any point without needing to provide a justification, and this will not result in any negative consequences for you. The data and personal information gathered as part of this study, as outlined above, will be treated with utmost confidentiality. For instance, any project staff members who come into direct contact with your personal data are bound by strict confidentiality obligations. Furthermore, the dissemination of study results will be conducted anonymously, meaning that your data cannot be linked back to you personally. In the event that you choose to discontinue your participation, you will have the opportunity to decide whether your data may be retained for anonymous research purposes or if you prefer to have your data erased. If you opt for the latter, your data will be promptly deleted by the study management.
